title: Senior Investment Banker at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
